zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness於大約1210年出生在蘇格蘭布特洛賽時，她的父親Séamus MacSomerled Macrory21歲，母親Ragnhild de L'Isles37歲。她於1239年與Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾享年88歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness于大约1210年出生在苏格兰布特洛賽时，她的父亲Séamus MacSomerled Macrory21岁，母亲Ragnhild de L'Isles37岁。她于1239年与Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1297年在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾享年88岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利。

nameMeanings.name: MacRory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí ‘son of Ruaidhrí’ (see Rorie ), a personal name derived from ruadh ‘red’ + rí ‘king’. There is possible influence from the Old Norse personal names Hróthrekr (see Roderick ) and Hróthgeirr (see Rogers 2), forms of which were used as Anglicized equivalents.

variants.name: McCreary
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Ruidhrí, a variant of Mac Ruaidhrí, ‘son of Ruaidhrí’, a personal name meaning ‘red king’. See also McCrory .

variants.name: Rorie
meanings: Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí ‘son of Ruaidhrí’ (Rory); see McCrory .

variants.name: McGrory
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McCrory  .

variants.name: McCrorey
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McCrory  .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness was born about 1210, in Rothesay, Bute, Scotland, her father, Séamus MacSomerled Macrory, was 21 and her mother, Ragnhild de L'Isles, was 37. She married Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland in 1239, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1297, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 88, and was buried in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness est née environ 1210, à Rothesay, Bute, Écosse, son père, Séamus MacSomerled Macrory, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ragnhild de L'Isles, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland en 1239, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1297, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness um 1210 in Rothesay, Bute, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Séamus MacSomerled Macrory 21 und ihre Mutter Ragnhild de L'Isles 37. Sie hat 1239 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1297 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness è nata il circa 1210 nel Rothesay, Bute, Scotland, sua padre, Séamus MacSomerled Macrory, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Ragnhild de L'Isles, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland nel 1239, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1297, nel Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchionessが約1210年にスコットランドブトロスエサイで生まれた時，父Séamus MacSomerled Macroryは21歳，母Ragnhild de L'Islesは37歳であった。1239年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでAlexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルで88歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness(이)가 대략 1210년 스컷랜드 부트 로트지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Séamus MacSomerled Macrory(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ragnhild de L'Isles(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1239년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에 묻혔다.

mn.Dundonald Castle, Irvine, Ayrshire, Scot: Dundonald, Air, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Rothesay, Bute, Scotland, seu pai, Séamus MacSomerled Macrory, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ragnhild de L'Isles, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland em 1239, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1297, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness родилась около 1210 г. в местности ротесеи, бут, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Séamus MacSomerled Macrory было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ragnhild de L'Isles, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland в 1239 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1297 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness nació aproximadamente 1210, en Rothesay, Bute, Scotland, su papá, Séamus MacSomerled Macrory, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Ragnhild de L'Isles, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland en 1239, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1297, en Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
